2606.31813.title: Geometry-Preserving Orthonormal Initialization for Low-Rank Adaptation in RLVR
2606.31813.paper_summary: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) and its variants enable parameter-efficient fine-tuning of large language models under the supervised fine-tuning (SFT) paradigm. However, their efficacy and behavior under Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) are less well understood. In particular, two structurally initialized LoRA variants, PiSSA and MiLoRA, which outperform standard LoRA under SFT, can underperform standard LoRA under RLVR and may even exhibit training instability. These observations suggest that how to initialize the low-rank matrices in RLVR remains unclear. In this work, we develop a theoretical analysis of LoRA in RLVR, showing that orthonormal initialization achieves the minimal gap between LoRA outcome and that of full fine-tuning. Guided by this insight, we propose geometry-preserving orthonormal initialization for low-rank adaptation in RLVR, leading to two new variants, RLPO and RLMO. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that the proposed orthonormal initialization stabilizes RLVR training and outperforms standard LoRA, contrasting with PiSSA and MiLoRA. Finally, our unified analysis for LoRA initialization also explains why PiSSA and MiLoRA can underperform in RLVR, which may be of independent interest. Code and checkpoints are publicly available at https://github.com/Richard-ZZZ/geometry-preserving-orthonormal-init-rlvr.
2606.31813.paper_summary_zh: 低秩適應（LoRA）及其變體使得在監督微調（SFT）範式下對大型語言模型進行參數高效的微調成為可能。<lb/>然而，它們在可驗證獎勵的強化學習（RLVR）下的有效性和行為尚不太明確。<lb/>特別是，兩個結構初始化的LoRA變體，PiSSA和MiLoRA，在SFT下表現優於標準LoRA，但在RLVR下可能表現不佳，甚至可能出現訓練不穩定的情況。<lb/>這些觀察表明，在RLVR中如何初始化低秩矩陣仍然不清楚。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們對RLVR中的LoRA進行了理論分析，顯示正交初始化實現了LoRA結果與完全微調結果之間的最小差距。<lb/>受到這一見解的指導，我們提出了在RLVR中進行低秩適應的幾何保持正交初始化，並導致了兩個新變體，RLPO和RLMO。<lb/>在數學推理基準上的實驗顯示，所提出的正交初始化穩定了RLVR訓練，並超越了標準LoRA，與PiSSA和MiLoRA形成對比。<lb/>最後，我們對LoRA初始化的統一分析也解釋了為什麼PiSSA和MiLoRA在RLVR中可能表現不佳，這可能是獨立的研究興趣。<lb/>代碼和檢查點可在 https://github.com/Richard-ZZZ/geometry-preserving-orthonormal-init-rlvr 取得。
2606.31813.author: Ruijia Zhang et.al.
2606.31813.authors: Ruijia Zhang, Jiacheng Zhu, Hanqing Zhu, Laixi Shi
